## 📝 Chapter/Section Details
**Chapter Number:** [e.g., Chapter 5]  
**Working Title:** [e.g., Analysis of Variance (ANOVA)]  
**Target Profile(s):** [ru, en, rd, all]

## 🎯 Learning Objectives
<!-- What should readers learn from this chapter? -->
- [ ] Objective 1
- [ ] Objective 2
- [ ] Objective 3

## 📋 Content Outline
<!-- Brief outline of sections -->
1. Introduction
2. Theory/Background
3. R Implementation
4. Examples
5. Exercises
6. Summary

## 🔗 Notion Methodology Link
<!-- Link to methodology/lesson plan in Notion -->
[Notion Page](https://notion.so/...)

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Write theoretical background
- [ ] Add R code examples
- [ ] Create/insert visualizations
- [ ] Add cross-references to other chapters
- [ ] Include exercises (link to assessment/)
- [ ] Add references to bibliography
- [ ] Test rendering in all profiles (ru/en/rd)
- [ ] Proofread for typos and clarity
- [ ] Update table of contents

## 📦 Required Resources
- [ ] Dataset: [name/location]
- [ ] R packages: `pkg1`, `pkg2`
- [ ] Images/diagrams
- [ ] External references

## 🧪 Testing
```bash
# Commands to test rendering
quarto preview book/ --profile ru
quarto preview book/ --profile rd
quarto preview book/ --profile en
```

Review Complete: [date]
